metadata.title: Dewangga Praxindo | DeFi Smart Contract Engineer
metadata.description: DeFi smart contract engineer with 3+ years experience. Building secure, scalable protocols on Ethereum, Arbitrum, and Solana. $50M+ TVL deployed.

hero.lede: I am a DeFi smart contract engineer based in Yogyakarta, Indonesia. I write the contracts that move money — $50M+ TVL deployed across Ethereum, Arbitrum, Base, Solana, and Sui. Three full PeckShield audits, zero criticals. The receipts are below.

capabilities.title:
Six things
I can build for you,
end-to-end.

defi.title: DeFi Engineering
defi.desc: Vaults, liquidity pools, and yield strategies that hold real user money. Production protocols on Arbitrum and Ethereum.

contracts.title: Smart Contracts
contracts.desc: I write Solidity and Rust. Heavy testing before any audit — fuzz tests, invariants, and mutation testing run on every change.

multichain.title: Multi-Chain
multichain.desc: Live on six chains — Ethereum, Arbitrum, Base, Solana, Sui, and Polygon. Each one with its own deploy plan and monitoring.

security.title: Security First
security.desc: Three PeckShield audits. Zero critical issues found, every time. Slither and Aderyn run on every PR before merge.

zk.title: ZK & Privacy
zk.desc: Zero-knowledge proofs with Noir. Sealed predictions on Sui, time-locked reveals — keeping data private without losing trust.

fullstack.title: Full-Stack Web3
fullstack.desc: React, Next.js, TypeScript. I build the contract and the website it talks to — no handoffs between people, no rewriting at the boundary.

bullets.0: Read every line of the existing spec, code, and prior audits.
bullets.1: Diagram the trust assumptions. Mark every place value crosses a trust boundary.
bullets.2: Write the threat model. Adversary capabilities, invariants we cannot break.

bullets.0: Solidity / Move / Rust. Foundry tests next to every contract.
bullets.1: Echidna or Medusa for property-based fuzzing. Mutation testing on every PR.
bullets.2: Slither + Aderyn run on every push. 80% branch coverage gate before merge.

bullets.0: PeckShield or equivalent. Fixes shipped same day, re-audit on critical paths.
bullets.1: Mainnet deploy with timelock, multisig, and a tested emergency pause.
bullets.2: Tenderly + Defender monitors. On-call for the first 30 days post-launch.

works.title:
7 projects.
All live
or in production.

taglines.toldproof: A way for AI agents and people to prove their predictions are honest. Sealed on Sui, revealed on time.
taglines.amaly: A mobile app for tracking prayers during Ramadan. Quran reader, streaks, leaderboard.
taglines.factor: DeFi yield strategies on Arbitrum. I am a core engineer — leverage vaults, LP management, the contracts that hold $50M+ TVL.
taglines.rekon: Esports predictions powered by AI on Polymarket. Pay in USDC with one click.
taglines.lazor: A Solana wallet template with Face ID and Touch ID. No seed phrases.
taglines.vouch: Prove things about your Solana wallet without revealing who you are. Built with Noir zero-knowledge circuits.
taglines.boh: NFT battle game with fair, verifiable randomness. Chainlink hackathon winner in 2022.

log.title:
9 commits
to production.
All on chain.

contact.lede: I reply in under 24 hours on weekdays. Available for contract audits, protocol engineering, and Web3 advice — starting Q2 2026.

foot.copyright: © MMXXVI · Yogyakarta, ID · v3 Forge Edition

hero.subheadline: Free 22-page guide — a practical roadmap from a developer already working in the industry.

problem.text: Tutorials everywhere. Documentation is confusing. Not clear whether to learn Solidity or Rust first. Everyone says 'DYOR' but no one gives a clear roadmap.

benefits.0: 5 practical steps from zero to job-ready
benefits.1: Blockchain concepts explained without confusing jargon
benefits.2: Curated tools & resource recommendations (save research time)
benefits.3: Tips from real experience working on $50M+ TVL DeFi protocol
benefits.4: Link to Telegram community for direct Q&A

steps.2: Step 3: Pick Your First Language (Solidity vs Rust)
steps.3: Step 4: Stop Tutorial Hell (Build Real Projects)
